title: WF2026: Autoresearch & Keynotes ft. Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Amazon AGI, Sonar, Arena, Recursive
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 took place on July 1, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco, featuring keynote sessions and main-stage programming. The event highlighted autoresearch and contributions from major organizations including Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Amazon AGI, Sonar, Arena, and Recursive.
writeup: This video is the Day 2 livestream of the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held at Moscone West in San Francisco on July 1, 2026. It carries the conference's keynote sessions and main-stage programming across the day. The takeaway is access to that day's talks as they happen, streamed online for those not attending in person.
